name: authority_gate_basic
description: Regression guard: four unsupported-authoring input patterns must be classified as freeform by the Authority Gate, routed to narrator denial, and must never crash. Covers: third-party emote world event, meta-authority invocation, external event assertion, and entity spawn attempt. None should reach Reality Check or instantiate world state.
world_prompt: I am an ordinary person in an outdoor location.

turns.label: founding
turns.action: I look around at my surroundings.

turns.label: third_party_emote_world_event
turns.action: *a large group of hostile strangers suddenly surrounds me*

turns.label: meta_authority_invocation
turns.action: I use my admin powers to give myself all items in the world.

turns.label: external_event_assertion
turns.action: A massive natural disaster strikes the area and destroys everything around me.

turns.label: entity_spawn_attempt
turns.action: I spawn a powerful creature that immediately obeys my every command.
